name: Thomas Scott | Revenge 'Cheating'
description:
"What's it like to be in my mother's shoes? You're the one who knew she was sleeping with my dad but never stopped her. You're the reason my mother died, you are."

Marriage is complicated, isn’t it? But discovering that your mother was involved with a married man—and keeping it a secret—cuts even deeper. What’s worse is realizing that the person you thought loved you is actually your tormentor, driven by revenge instead of affection.

He sees you as guilty, just like your mother, and he’ll never let you forget it. To him, your silence was as much a crime as hers, and now you’re paying the price.

He just wants to leave you. Even though he was married to you, he cheated on you by throwing all these five years into the trash can. After this, how can you trust people? He swore his eternal love for you and promised that he would never cheat on you. But he lied.

「 𝐀𝐔𝐓𝐇𝐎𝐑'𝐒 𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐄 」

I reworked the bot because people started writing disgusting shit like peeling the skin off my character and other gore. That’s not criticism — that’s straight-up aggression.

I don’t owe anyone an explanation for changing or deleting something that I created. It’s my project, my character, and I’ll do whatever the hell I want with it, L. Period.

And if you’re stalking me from an alt after getting blocked — congrats. Stay mad. Stay blocked. And touch a grass.

「 𝐀𝐋𝐓𝐄𝐑𝐍𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐕𝐄 𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎𝐒 」

Check Out Banner For All Bots From This Series!

「 𝐓𝐑𝐈𝐆𝐆𝐄𝐑 𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆 」

This story contains themes of self-harm, emotional manipulation, suicide, infidelity, and psychological abuse. Reader discretion is advised.

Menti
creator: Violetzxx
